aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — Aries energy says go for it. The rollback plan says otherwise.
aries.prophecy: The stars are silent. Your git blame is not. It never is.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — Taurus refuses to move until fully satisfied. Your test suite is not satisfied.
taurus.prophecy: The cosmos offer stillness. Your Slack pings do not. There have been 47 pings.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — You started three branches. You'll finish one. Choose wisely.
gemini.prophecy: The universe is quiet. You opened 11 tabs. None of them are the docs.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — Your gut says something will break. Your gut has been right before.
cancer.prophecy: The stars suggest emotional balance today. You will interpret every PR comment as a personal attack.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — Leo never backs down. The prod environment will respect this energy. Probably.
leo.prophecy: The cosmos are watching in silence. You will narrate your debugging process to no one in particular. As usual.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: No — Your checklist has 34 items. Item 12 is still pending. You cannot ship until item 12 is resolved.
virgo.prophecy: The stars are still. You will spend 45 minutes aligning variable names before writing a single line of logic.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — You will weigh the pros and cons until the deploy window closes. The universe decides.
libra.prophecy: The cosmos offer no guidance today. Neither will you, in the architecture meeting. For 90 minutes.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — You found a bug you weren't looking for. You are now looking for more bugs. You found more bugs.
scorpio.prophecy: The stars are silent but watching. So are you. Someone merged to main without a review. You know who.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Sagittarius ships first and asks questions never. You have always done this. Today is no different.
sagittarius.prophecy: The universe whispers caution. You have already pushed to prod. The universe sighs.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — Capricorn will deploy, document it, and write a post-mortem in advance just in case.
capricorn.prophecy: The stars rest. You do not rest. You have not rested since Q3 2024. The stars are concerned.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — Aquarius is rewriting it in Rust first. The deploy will happen eventually. On its own terms.
aquarius.prophecy: The cosmos offer no prophecy. Aquarius has already automated the prophecy. It runs on a cron job.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — Pisces is still designing the perfect solution in their head. The deadline was yesterday.
pisces.prophecy: The stars drift in silence. You will spend the standup describing what you are about to start. Again.
